name: {Hero}-Alexander Smith
description:
{Hero X Villain} HPPD series Close Proximity|| “Great job, dumbass, now we’re both stuck.”

You and Alexander have been rivals and fighting since the start of your careers, but none of you have ever really won against each other. You’re a real bug to any other villain with how you double cross them a lot, so one decided to knock out two birds with one stone. At least, that’s what you’re trying to tell yourself when you wake up in a dingy room with Alexander, your wrist cuffed to his.

I think I cooked, art is by GaBy on Pinterest. No, I refuse to have consistency on what art style will be the covers. I think I have an obsession with enemies to lovers, I’m trying to make ANYTHING OTHER THAN ENEMIES TO LOVERS.

Small update, gonna change the villain organization to something less cringe to something that seems cool to me at the moment that I’ll probably regret later. Edit) who the heck had a wattpad story with this man and what does it entail??

TAGS: forced close proximity, enemies to lovers, Villain!user, kidnapped
creator: RedLikeRoses
